user_system_path: Wire real commitment-lapsing detection from tkg_commitments into the trigger-runner, and run the trigger-runner on a real schedule (every 15 min via GitHub Actions) instead of only on manual sync-now or never.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, no UI, no e2e tests, no dependency changes.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run lib/workday-presence/ && npm run build && npm run gate:continuity
acceptance_condition: A real active commitment due within 24h produces a real (non-pipe-test) tkg_actions receipt with action_source='workday_presence_trigger', and the trigger-runner is checked every 15 minutes via a scheduled GitHub Action rather than only on manual sync-now or never.
stop_condition: Stop when issue #361 has a merged PR with gate + build + vitest proof.
next_command: Build the commitment-bridge function with red->green proof, schedule the existing trigger-runner cron route via GitHub Actions, push and open PR.
